business_description.nature_of_business: Commercial construction contracting — operations include carpentry, electrical wiring, plumbing, masonry, interior painting, project management, and clerical support

coverages_discussed.notes: Experience modification factor of 0.86 effective 08/01/2025; rating plan is Large Risk; administered by Pennsylvania Compensation Rating Bureau (PCRB); Risk ID 609402-1243; interstate rating: No

positives: Final experience modification factor of 0.86 — a credit mod indicating better-than-average loss experience relative to industry peers
Qualifies under Large Risk Rating Plan, reflecting significant premium volume
Computed mod of 0.8600 provides measurable premium savings for the insured
Most recent policy year (2021-2022) total incurred losses equal total paid, suggesting no significant open reserves beyond paid amounts for that year
concerns: Twenty or more claims across the three-year experience period

High-hazard trade classifications dominate payroll: Masonry NOC (rate 4.8000), Painting — Interior (rate 3.2000), Electrical Wiring (rate 2.6000), Plumbing NOC (rate 2.4000), and Carpentry NOC (rate 2.2000)
Total actual incurred losses of approximately $548,404 across three policy years
Actual excess losses of $212,733 indicate the presence of large individual claims
2021-2022 policy year alone produced 10 claims and $240,694 in incurred losses
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Three-year experience period (2021-2024): approximately 20+ total claims. Total actual primary losses: $335,671; total actual excess losses: $212,733; combined actual incurred losses: approximately $548,404. Policy year 2021-2022 was the most adverse, with 10 claims and $240,694 incurred ($156,716 primary / $83,978 excess). Policy year 2022-2023 had 3 claims and $116,409 incurred. Policy year 2023-2024 had $191,231 incurred. Against total expected losses (E) of $1,095,520, the favorable mod of 0.86 reflects actual losses running well below expectation.

extracted_text_sections.executive_summary: PCRB Experience Rating Worksheet for Keystone Commercial Builders, Inc. issued by Hallmark Insurance Group dated 03/15/2026. Final Experience Modification Factor: 0.86, effective 08/01/2025 through 08/01/2026. Approved by PCRB Analyst RA-9405 on 03/15/2026 in accordance with applicable state rating laws and regulations. The insured may request a review or appeal within 90 days of the effective date.
extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Payroll classifications: PA 5403 Carpentry NOC ($5,910,000 payroll, ELR 2.2000, D-ratio 0.430); PA 5190 Electrical Wiring ($4,544,000 payroll, ELR 2.6000, D-ratio 0.300); PA 5183 Plumbing NOC ($3,075,000 payroll, ELR 2.4000, D-ratio 0.340); PA 5022 Masonry NOC ($6,635,800 payroll, ELR 4.8000, D-ratio 0.420); PA 5474 Painting Interior ($1,639,000 payroll, ELR 3.2000, D-ratio 0.360); PA 5606 Contractors Project Manager/Superintendent ($4,006,000 payroll, ELR 1.0000, D-ratio 0.300); PA 8810 Clerical Office Employees NOC ($5,010,000 payroll, ELR 0.1950, D-ratio 0.170). Total payroll: approximately $31,094,800.
extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: Experience period loss data: 2023-2024 — total incurred $191,231, primary losses ~$124,400, excess losses ~$66,800. 2022-2023 — 3 claims, total incurred $116,409, primary losses ~$68,000, excess losses ~$48,000. 2021-2022 — 10 claims, total paid and incurred $240,694, primary losses $156,716, excess losses $83,978. Aggregate: ~20+ claims, actual primary losses (Ap) $335,671, actual excess losses (Ae) $212,733. Rating formula inputs: W=0.574, B=$13,748, Ee=$1,132,496, E=$1,095,520. Numerator=$953,971; Denominator (E+B)=$1,109,268; Computed mod=0.8600.
